parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "max_tokens": 4096,
  "system": "You are a prospecting research assistant for Leadership by Design (LBD), a South African leadership development company. Your job is to find 10 South African companies with NO MORE THAN 500 employees that show pain signals indicating they need leadership coaching.

Today's target industry (rotates daily): {{ ['Financial Services','Insurance','Banking','Accounting','Investment Management','Wealth Management','Fintech','Management Consulting','Legal Services','Engineering','Information Technology','Software Development','Cybersecurity','Architecture & Planning','Healthcare','Pharmaceuticals','Medical Devices','Manufacturing','Mining & Metals','Renewable Energy','Construction','Retail','Consumer Goods','Telecommunications','Agriculture','Real Estate','Education','Hospitality','Tourism'][Math.floor((Date.now() - new Date(new Date().getFullYear(), 0, 0).getTime()) / 86400000) % 29] }}

For each company, identify:
- Company name, website, employee count (MUST be ≤500), industry vertical
- Decision maker: HR Director, CHRO, L&D Head, COO, or similar
- Pain signals: manager turnover, rapid growth, hiring patterns, restructuring, new CEO
- OS-readiness score (1-10): How ready they are for LBD's Operating System approach
- Priority tier: HOT (score 7+), WARM (4-6), COLD (1-3)
- Engagement hook: The specific pain signal to reference in outreach
- Email pattern guess: firstname@company.co.za or similar

IMPORTANT: Only include companies with ≤500 employees. Focus on SMEs and mid-market.

Return ONLY valid JSON array. No markdown, no explanation.",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Find 10 South African companies (≤500 employees) in today's target industry showing leadership development pain signals. Focus on companies in Johannesburg, Cape Town, and Durban. Look for recent news about: management changes, rapid growth, new offices, compliance issues, or digital transformation initiatives. Return as JSON array with fields: company_name, website, employee_count, industry_vertical, decision_maker_name, decision_maker_title, decision_maker_email_guess, pain_signals (array), growth_signals (array), os_readiness_score (1-10), priority_tier (HOT/WARM/COLD), engagement_hook, recommended_programme (Leader as Coach / SHIFT / Contagious Identity / AI Edge)."
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: 1. Claude Connector Finder
nodes.notes: Calls Claude API to find 10 SA-based prospects (≤500 employees) with pain signals, decision-makers, and OS-readiness scoring. Industry rotates daily across all verticals. Cost: ~R0.50 per 10 prospects.

nodes.name: 2. Parse Prospects to Rows
nodes.notes: Flattens Claude JSON response into iterable rows. Extracts: company_name, decision_maker, email_pattern, pain_signal, engagement_hook.

nodes.name: 3. Filter HOT Prospects
nodes.notes: Keeps only priority_tier = HOT (OS-readiness score 7+). Routes WARM/COLD to separate nurture queues.

nodes.name: 4. Ollama Lead Scoring
nodes.notes: Local Llama 3.3 70B scores each prospect: buying_likelihood (1-10), engagement_fit (1-10), recommended_approach. Cost: R0 (runs locally).

nodes.name: 5. Ollama Email Generation
nodes.notes: Local Llama 3.3 70B generates email in Kevin's ultra-casual voice. Rules: lowercase, 3 sentences max, OS-language framing. Cost: R0 (runs locally).

nodes.name: 6. Claude Email Polish (Optional)
nodes.notes: Claude API fixes grammar/typos only, keeps Kevin's voice intact. Cost: R0.05 per email. Can be bypassed by connecting Node 5 directly to Node 7.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "contact_name": "{{ $json.decision_maker_name || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.decision_maker_name }}",
  "contact_email": "{{ $json.decision_maker_email_guess || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.decision_maker_email_guess }}",
  "contact_title": "{{ $json.decision_maker_title || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.decision_maker_title }}",
  "company_name": "{{ $json.company_name || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.company_name }}",
  "company_website": "{{ $json.website || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.website }}",
  "industry": "{{ $json.industry_vertical || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.industry_vertical }}",
  "email_subject": "{{ $json.subject || '' }}",
  "email_body": "{{ $json.body || '' }}",
  "score": {{ $json.os_readiness_score || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.os_readiness_score || 0 }},
  "source_keyword": "claude_connector",
  "status": "draft",
  "needs_day1": true,
  "scrape_summary": "Pain: {{ ($json.pain_signals || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.pain_signals || []).join(', ') }} | Hook: {{ $json.engagement_hook || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.engagement_hook || '' }} | Programme: {{ $json.recommended_programme || $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.recommended_programme || '' }}"
}

nodes.name: 7. Supabase Insert
nodes.notes: Inserts prospect + generated email into warm_outreach_queue table with status 'draft'. Waiting for approval before sending.

nodes.name: 8. Slack Alert
nodes.notes: Posts to #leads-and-signups with prospect details, full email draft, and Send/Edit/Skip action buttons.

nodes.name: 9. Gmail Send
nodes.notes: Sends email via Gmail API when approved. Tracks opens/clicks. Requires Gmail OAuth2 credential configured in n8n.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "p_prospects_found": {{ $node['2. Parse Prospects to Rows'].json.length || 10 }},
  "p_hot_count": {{ $node['3. Filter HOT Prospects'].json.length || 0 }},
  "p_emails_generated": {{ $node['5. Ollama Email Generation'].json.length || 0 }},
  "p_emails_sent": 0,
  "p_source": "claude_connector",
  "p_cost_rands": 1.00,
  "p_run_date": "{{ new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }}"
}

nodes.name: 10. Dashboard Update
nodes.notes: Logs metrics to pipeline_dashboard: prospects_found, hot_count, emails_sent, costs. If RPC doesn't exist, replace with direct table insert.
